title: Pan-Seared Norwegian Salmon with Rye Flatbread Crust
description: A simple yet flavorful dish featuring pan-seared salmon, topped with a crispy rye flatbread crust. This recipe is perfect for a quick dinner or lunch.
instructions: Finely chop the rye flatbread into crumbs.
Season the salmon fillets with flaky sea salt.
Heat olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium heat.
Sear the salmon fillets for 2 minutes on each side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes or until cooked through.
Top each salmon fillet with rye flatbread crumbs and return to the oven for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the crust is golden brown.
Serve immediately with lemon wedges on the side.
